summary: Consider adding an explicit assertion or comment that ulysses_size > 0 to guard against future removal of the early return, preventing ZeroDivisionError.
The local import duplicates a module-level import, adding a redundant re-import per call; consider reusing the existing import.
Document the invariant that sp_num_vision_items defaults to 1 and sound cannot be combined with transfer or action, to protect against future sound+transfer modes.
Confirm whether any integration test exercises the pipeline-level sound padding path with sp_video_shape, and consider adding a focused pipeline test if none exists.
Clarify the comment for the base variable to mention that num_vision_items accounts for transfer-control vision items, making base the total vision token count.
Update docstring to explicitly note that transfer control (num_vision_items > 1) is mutually exclusive with sound, preventing future confusion.
Consider renaming video_shape to latent_video_shape or documenting that it receives latent-space dimensions to avoid misinterpretation as pixel-space dimensions.
